schedule.title: Opening Ceremony
schedule.description: Welcome session introducing the hackathon theme, rules, judges, mentors, and sponsors.

schedule.title: Registration & Check-in
schedule.description: Participants complete registration, receive badges, and confirm their participation.

schedule.title: Registration Closes
schedule.description: Final deadline for participant check-in and team confirmations.

schedule.title: Hackathon Orientation
schedule.description: Organizers explain problem statements, judging criteria, and event guidelines.

schedule.title: Team Formation & Idea Discussion
schedule.description: Participants form teams and discuss possible solutions and project ideas.

schedule.title: Exploration Time – Incubation Center
schedule.description: Explore sponsor booths, tech demos, networking areas, and mini activities.

schedule.title: First Elimination / Idea Screening
schedule.description: Teams briefly present their concept and approach to judges for review.

schedule.title: Dinner
schedule.description: Dinner break for participants before continuing development sessions.

schedule.title: Hackathon Work Time
schedule.description: Teams begin building their solutions and start coding their projects.

schedule.title: Midnight Jam Session
schedule.description: Short break with music, games, and relaxation after long coding hours.

schedule.title: Breakfast
schedule.description: Morning breakfast served to help participants recharge for the day.

schedule.title: Round 2 / Progress Review
schedule.description: Teams present progress updates and working prototypes to mentors.

schedule.title: Elimination Round
schedule.description: Teams are evaluated based on progress, feasibility, and innovation.

schedule.title: Lunch Break
schedule.description: Lunch break before continuing development and mentoring sessions.

schedule.title: Free Time & Sponsor Activities
schedule.description: Participants explore sponsor challenges, demos, and networking areas.

schedule.title: Hackathon Development Time
schedule.description: Teams continue developing their solutions and improving prototypes.

schedule.title: Jam / Stand-up Comedy Session
schedule.description: Relaxation session with entertainment to refresh participants.

schedule.title: Dinner
schedule.description: Dinner break before continuing the late-night development phase.

schedule.title: Mentor Session
schedule.description: Industry mentors provide guidance, feedback, and technical advice.

schedule.title: Night Development Session
schedule.description: Final overnight coding session to complete projects and polish demos.

schedule.title: Breakfast
schedule.description: Breakfast served before the final preparation and presentation rounds.

schedule.title: Final Preparation Session
schedule.description: Teams finalize prototypes, prepare presentations, and test demos.

schedule.title: Lunch
schedule.description: Lunch break before the final project demonstration sessions.

schedule.title: Project Demonstration & Evaluation
schedule.description: Teams present their solutions and working prototypes to judges.

schedule.title: Closing Ceremony / Results
schedule.description: Winners announced, prizes distributed, and hackathon officially ends.

schedule.title: Opening Ceremony
schedule.description: The hackathon begins with a welcome address introducing the event theme, rules, judges, mentors, and sponsors.

schedule.title: Registration & Check-in
schedule.description: Participants complete registration, receive entry badges, and get event information.

schedule.title: Registration Closes
schedule.description: Final deadline for participant registration and check-in.

schedule.title: Hackathon Orientation
schedule.description: Participants are guided about problem statements, judging criteria, and hackathon rules.

schedule.title: Team Formation & Idea Discussion
schedule.description: Participants form teams and brainstorm ideas for their hackathon projects.

schedule.title: Exploration Time – Incubation Center
schedule.description: Participants explore sponsor booths, tech demos, mini-games, and networking activities in the incubation center.

schedule.title: First Elimination / Idea Screening
schedule.description: Teams present their initial idea or concept to the judges. Selected teams proceed to the development stage.

schedule.title: Dinner
schedule.description: Dinner break for participants before continuing with development activities.

schedule.title: Hackathon Work Time
schedule.description: Teams begin working on their projects by planning, coding, and designing solutions.

schedule.title: Midnight Jam Session
schedule.description: A short informal break with music, jokes, and light activities to relax participants.

schedule.title: Breakfast
schedule.description: Morning breakfast provided by the college for participants.

schedule.title: Round 2 / Progress Review
schedule.description: Teams present their progress and working prototype to mentors and judges.

schedule.title: Elimination Round
schedule.description: Teams are evaluated based on feasibility, progress, and innovation. Some teams may be eliminated.

schedule.title: Lunch Break
schedule.description: Lunch break for participants before continuing development sessions.

schedule.title: Free Time & Sponsor Activities
schedule.description: Participants can explore sponsor activity zones with fun challenges, tech demos, and networking opportunities.

schedule.title: Hackathon Development Time
schedule.description: Teams continue developing and improving their project prototypes.

schedule.title: Jam / Stand-up Comedy Session
schedule.description: Entertainment session to relax participants after long coding hours.

schedule.title: Dinner
schedule.description: Dinner break before continuing the late-night development phase.

schedule.title: Mentor Session
schedule.description: Industry mentors guide teams, give feedback, and help improve technical execution.

schedule.title: Night Development Session
schedule.description: Teams continue working overnight to complete their projects.

schedule.title: Breakfast
schedule.description: Morning breakfast provided by the college before the final sessions.

schedule.title: Final Preparation Session
schedule.description: Teams finalize projects, prepare presentations, and practice demos.

schedule.title: Lunch
schedule.description: Lunch break before final project demonstrations.

schedule.title: Project Demonstration & Final Evaluation
schedule.description: Teams present their working prototype and pitch their solution to the judges.

schedule.title: Closing Ceremony / Result Announcement
schedule.description: Winners are announced, prizes are distributed, and sponsors are acknowledged.
